{{BaseTemplate}}
=== Scope of this topic and related important content ===
Text

=== Distinction from other articles within the topic Electrocatalytic CO2 conversion ===
Text

=== Important aspects of homogeneous electrocatalytic CO2 conversion ===
Text

=== Summary of selected scientific progress ===
'''False Table!'''

''Table of all experiments that have a turnover number >100 for one of the products CO, CH2, HCOOH, H2 or MeOH. This table is sorted by catalyst.''

{{#experimentlink:|form=EC_conversion_of_CO2_overview_experiments|restrictToPages=|description=Hom electrochem CO2|sort=|order=}}

[[Category:Electrochemical CO2 conversion]]
